name: Dr. Amina Wanjiru
title: AI Research Lead
bioShort: Dr. Amina leads groundbreaking research in natural language processing for African languages. She has published over 30 papers on low-resource NLP and machine translation.

name: Prof. David Odhiambo
title: Professor of Computer Science
bioShort: Professor Odhiambo specializes in computer vision applications for agriculture. His work on crop disease detection using deep learning has impacted over 10,000 farmers across East Africa.

name: Dr. Zainab Abiola
title: Head of AI Ethics
bioShort: Dr. Abiola is a leading voice on AI ethics and responsible AI deployment in Africa. She advises governments and organizations on ethical AI frameworks and policy development.

name: James Kimani
title: Machine Learning Engineer
bioShort: James builds ML systems for fraud detection and financial inclusion at M-Pesa. His models process over 1 million transactions daily, protecting Kenya's mobile money ecosystem.

name: Dr. Fatima Hassan
title: Healthcare AI Researcher
bioShort: Dr. Hassan develops AI diagnostic tools for low-resource healthcare settings. Her malaria detection system has been deployed in 50+ rural clinics across Kenya and Tanzania.

name: Samuel Mwangi
title: Data Scientist
bioShort: Samuel leads data science initiatives at Safaricom, focusing on customer analytics and network optimization. He's passionate about using data to improve telecommunications in Africa.

name: Dr. Mariam Nduta
title: AI for Education Specialist
bioShort: Dr. Nduta pioneers AI-powered personalized learning platforms for Kenyan schools. Her adaptive learning system has reached 100,000+ students across rural and urban areas.

name: Prof. Kwame Osei
title: Robotics Professor
bioShort: Professor Osei researches robotics for African manufacturing and agriculture. His affordable robotic solutions are helping small-scale farmers automate harvesting processes.

name: Grace Adhiambo
title: Climate Tech AI Lead
bioShort: Grace develops ML models for climate prediction and early warning systems. Her work helps Kenyan communities prepare for droughts and floods using satellite data and weather patterns.

name: Dr. Ibrahim Ouma
title: AI Startup Founder
bioShort: Dr. Ouma founded DataHive, a startup building AI solutions for supply chain optimization in East Africa. The company has raised $2M and serves 50+ businesses.

name: Catherine Njeri
title: Computer Vision Engineer
bioShort: Catherine works on Google's AI initiatives for Africa, focusing on image recognition for local languages and cultural contexts. She's passionate about inclusive AI development.

name: Dr. Emmanuel Kiptoo
title: Quantum Computing Researcher
bioShort: Dr. Kiptoo researches quantum algorithms for optimization problems relevant to African industries. His work bridges quantum computing and practical business applications.

name: Lucy Wambui
title: AI Product Manager
bioShort: Lucy leads product development for AI-powered tools designed for African markets. She specializes in building products that work in low-bandwidth, offline-first environments.

name: Dr. Ahmed Mohammed
title: NLP Research Scientist
bioShort: Dr. Mohammed specializes in speech recognition and text-to-speech for Ethiopian languages. His multilingual AI systems support 10+ Ethiopian languages.

name: Rose Kamau
title: AI for Wildlife Conservation
bioShort: Rose uses AI and drones for anti-poaching efforts in Kenyan national parks. Her camera trap classification system identifies endangered species in real-time.

name: Dr. Michael Otieno
title: Reinforcement Learning Expert
bioShort: Dr. Otieno researches reinforcement learning applications for energy grid optimization in Kenya. His algorithms help balance power distribution and reduce outages.

name: Esther Nyambura
title: AI Community Builder
bioShort: Esther founded AI Kenya, a community of 5,000+ AI enthusiasts. She organizes workshops, hackathons, and mentorship programs to grow Kenya's AI talent pipeline.

name: Dr. Peter Waweru
title: Bioinformatics Researcher
bioShort: Dr. Waweru applies ML to genomics research, studying infectious diseases prevalent in East Africa. His work on malaria resistance has been published in Nature.

name: Naomi Chebet
title: AI Safety Researcher
bioShort: Naomi researches AI alignment and safety at DeepMind. She advocates for incorporating African perspectives into global AI safety discussions and frameworks.

name: Dr. Daniel Kipchirchir
title: Federated Learning Expert
bioShort: Dr. Kipchirchir researches privacy-preserving ML techniques for African healthcare data. His federated learning frameworks enable collaborative ML without sharing sensitive patient data.
